AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: MyDreamTesla is the most comprehensive Tesla vehicle comparison tool. We help buyers make informed decisions by providing detailed specs, side-by-side comparisons, and expert analysis for every Tesla model and trim.
AboutPage.introduction: MyDreamTesla is the most comprehensive Tesla vehicle comparison tool. We help buyers make informed decisions by providing detailed specs, side-by-side comparisons, and expert analysis for every Tesla model and trim.

hero.title: Every Tesla. Every Year. Compared.
hero.description: The most comprehensive Tesla vehicle database. Compare specs, prices, and features across every Model 3, Y, S, X, and Cybertruck — from the first generation to the latest refresh.

logocloud.title: Your favorite companies are our partners

integration.title: Tesla Ecosystem
integration.subtitle: Connected to the Tesla world
integration.description: Comprehensive data coverage across the entire Tesla vehicle lineup and ecosystem.

item-1.title: Model 3
item-1.description: Complete specs for every Model 3 trim — Standard, Long Range, and Performance.

item-2.title: Model Y
item-2.description: Detailed data for the world's best-selling EV, including Juniper refresh.

item-3.title: Model S
item-3.description: Full specifications for Tesla's flagship sedan, from original to Plaid.

item-4.title: Model X
item-4.description: Every trim and generation of Tesla's premium SUV with falcon wing doors.

item-5.title: Cybertruck
item-5.description: All Cybertruck variants with complete specs, pricing, and availability info.

item-6.title: Supercharger Network
item-6.description: Charging speed and compatibility data across Tesla's global Supercharger network.

integration2.title: Every Tesla model covered in detail
integration2.description: From Model 3 to Cybertruck — compare specs, pricing, and features across the entire Tesla lineup.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to compare Teslas
features.description: The most powerful Tesla comparison tool available

item-1.title: Detailed Specs
item-1.description: Every specification for every Tesla trim, from range and acceleration to cargo capacity and pricing.

item-2.title: Side-by-Side Comparison
item-2.description: Compare any two Tesla vehicles head-to-head with our powerful comparison tool.

item-3.title: Year-over-Year Tracking
item-3.description: See how Tesla models have evolved across generations and model years.

item-4.title: Smart Recommendations
item-4.description: Get personalized Tesla recommendations based on your needs and budget.

features2.title: Compare Tools
features2.subtitle: Everything you need to compare Teslas
features2.description: Powerful tools to help you find the perfect Tesla

features3.title: Why MyDreamTesla
features3.subtitle: The most comprehensive Tesla resource
features3.description: Everything you need to make an informed Tesla purchase

item-1.title: Complete Model Database
item-1.description: Every Tesla model, trim, and generation from 2017 to today — all in one place.

item-2.title: Accurate Specifications
item-2.description: Range, acceleration, price, dimensions, and more — verified and up to date.

item-3.title: Visual Comparisons
item-3.description: Clean, intuitive side-by-side layouts that make differences easy to spot.

item-4.title: Generation Tracking
item-4.description: Track how each Tesla model has evolved through refreshes and updates.

item-5.title: Region-Aware Data
item-5.description: Specs and availability tailored to your region, including US and Canada.

item-6.title: Free and Open
item-6.description: Access all comparison features for free — no account required.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pricing
pricing.description: Choose the plan that works best for you

item-1.question: Do you offer a free trial?
item-1.answer: Yes, we offer a 7-day free trial.

item-2.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
item-2.answer: You can cancel your subscription by visiting the billing page.

item-3.question: Can I change my plan?
item-3.answer: Yes, you can change your plan at any time by visiting the billing page.

item-4.question: What is the refund policy?
item-4.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee if you are not happy with our product.

item-5.question: Have more questions?
item-5.answer: We'd love to help! Reach out to our support team at support@mydreamtesla.com and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

item-1.name: Sarah Chen
item-1.quote: MyDreamTesla made it so easy to compare the Model 3 trims. I ended up choosing the Long Range and couldn't be happier.

item-2.name: Marcus Johnson
item-2.quote: Finally a site that shows every Tesla year and trim in one place. The comparison tool saved me hours of research.

item-3.name: Emily Rodriguez
item-3.quote: I was torn between Model Y and Model 3. The side-by-side comparison on MyDreamTesla helped me decide in minutes.

item-4.name: David Park
item-4.quote: As someone who reviews EVs, MyDreamTesla is my go-to reference. The year-over-year spec tracking is incredibly useful.

item-5.name: Lisa Thompson
item-5.quote: I used MyDreamTesla to compare the Model S Plaid vs Long Range. The detailed specs made my decision so much easier.

item-6.name: James Wilson
item-6.quote: Great resource for tracking how Tesla specs have changed over the years. Helped me understand exactly what I'm getting with the Cybertruck.

item-7.name: Priya Patel
item-7.quote: As a first-time EV buyer, MyDreamTesla gave me all the information I needed to choose between Tesla models. Absolutely invaluable.

item-8.name: Robert Kim
item-8.quote: The comparison feature is fantastic. I compared every Model X trim from 2020 to 2025 before making my purchase. Highly recommend this tool.

item-9.name: Amanda Foster
item-9.quote: MyDreamTesla is the most comprehensive Tesla database I've found. I use it regularly for my articles. The data accuracy is impressive.

item-10.name: Carlos Mendez
item-10.quote: Being able to compare the original Model 3 with the Highland refresh side by side was exactly what I needed. MyDreamTesla nailed it.

item-11.name: Michelle Wang
item-11.quote: Managing a fleet of Teslas means I need accurate specs for every model year. MyDreamTesla is the only tool that has it all in one place.

item-12.name: Alex Turner
item-12.quote: I recommend MyDreamTesla to everyone considering a Tesla. The detailed trim comparisons and pricing history are unmatched.

stats.title: Stats
stats.subtitle: MyDreamTesla in Numbers

calltoaction.title: Find Your Dream Tesla
calltoaction.description: Find your perfect Tesla. Compare every model, trim, and year with detailed specs and pricing.
